evidence_boundary: This protocol prepares provider-billing and success-per-dollar evidence collection. Blank rows are pending, not realized bills or negative evidence.
completion_requirements: Every evidence slot must be filled from a provider usage export, invoice, or auditable billing dashboard record.
Every measured row must include provider, model_alias, billing period, token counts, billed_usd, currency, invoice_or_usage_evidence, success_metric, success_value, and reviewer_id.
Do not claim provider billing, realized bills, or success-per-dollar until the summary reports billing_status=complete and zero errors.
Keep local token proxies separate from provider-specific billing rows.

evidence_slots.task_scope: DeepSeek follow-up rows after user configuration
Bounded smoke or future full live AI-Scientist-v2 run
Full-paper, generated-skill, summary, and abstract context variants
